ljdkj vf/klwpuk la[;k dk-vk- 536 ¼v½] rkjh[k 17 Qjojh] 2015 dks ,rn~}kjk fujLr djrh gSA [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@761@lhvks@15&16@thlh fr:ouariqje ¼0-000&26-500½ih,Q] nf{krk nkl] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd September, 2016 S.O. 2846(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide G.S.R 838(E) dated 5th December, 2008 and its amendments, the Central Government by notification umber S.O. 536(E), dated 17th February, 2015 of the Government of India has authorized State Government of Kerala to collect fee on mechanical vehicles for the use of Akkulam Bridge across Akkulam Kayal at km 6/400 of Thiruvananthapuram Bypass of National Highway No. 47 (New NH 66) in the State of Kerala (hereinafter referred to as the “said section”). Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby rescinds the notification number S.O. 536(E) dated 17th February, 2015. [F. No. NHAI/13013/761/CO/15-16/GC Thiruvananthapuram (0.000 – 26.500) PF] DAKSHITA DAs, Jt. Secy. 4259 GI/2016 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
